calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-17-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Charles O. Morgan, Jr., Esq. for Plaintiff: William C. Doyle, Jr. ind. and as trustee of William C. Doyle Defined Pension Plan.
Plaintiff's witness: William C. Doyle, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Joseph M. Martin and Creative Qualified Plan Solutions as follows:
Damages $23,830.00
Costs $443.00, for a total of $24,273.00
Judgment signed in open court.
